The Great Crater of Paldea, Paldea (location)

This is the Pokémon Location guide for The Great Crater of Paldea in Paldea.

Choose which generation of games you're playing to see the Pokémon and capture methods.

  • Generation 9
  • Deepest Level - Rocky
  • Deepest Level - Cave
  • Deepest Level - Grass
  • Deepest Level - Underground
  • Hidden Cave
  • Lower Level - Grass
  • Lower Level - River
  • Lower Level - Rocky
  • Upper Level - Grass
  • Upper Level - River
  • Upper Level - Rocky

Generation 9 - Deepest Level - Rocky

Interact
